meaning: adj.外部的,外在的,表面的,外交的,[建](适合)外用的n.外部,表面,外型
examples: The exterior of the house needs painting.
The exterior walls were made of preformed concrete.
His gruff exterior concealed one of the kindest hearts.
Another icon of British Bombay, the Norman-Gothic exterior covers a magical selection of stalls.
In contrast to the humble exterior, the interior features clean lines and a light colour scheme.
